name: Microsoft Solitaire Collection
version_note: Windows 11 Microsoft Solitaire Collection (UWP Store app).

startup_sequence.note: Wait for app to fully load

launch.method: Use the startup_sequence. After startup, the LLM must click on Klondike tile and start a new game.
launch.post_startup_instructions: After the startup sequence, you MUST: 1) Look at the screen to find the Klondike game tile, 2) Click on it, 3) If a game is in progress, click 'New' on the bottom toolbar then 'End Game', 4) Select Easy difficulty, 5) Then start playing.
startup_issues: The app remembers the LAST game played (might be Spider, FreeCell, etc.) — you MUST click on Klondike specifically.

klondike.rules: 7 tableau columns, 4 foundations (top right), stock (top left), waste pile.
klondike.goal: Move all cards to foundations, Ace to King by suit.
klondike.how_to_start_new_game: Click the Klondike tile in the top game bar. If a game is in progress, click 'New' button on the bottom toolbar, then click 'End Game' (gold button), then select Easy difficulty.
tips: SINGLE-CLICK a card to auto-move it to the best valid position — much easier than dragging.
Clicking a card in a stack moves the entire sub-stack together.
Move Aces and 2s to foundations immediately by single-clicking them.
After inactivity, the game highlights the next suggested move with a yellowish glow.
Use H key for on-demand hints.
When stock pile is empty, click the empty stock area to recycle drawn cards.
Click through all face-up tableau cards after each stock draw to find all moves.
Move Kings to empty tableau columns immediately to free up hidden cards.
Use D key to draw from stock pile instead of clicking it.

ui_layout.game_tiles: Top row shows game options: Klondike (usually first/leftmost), Spider, FreeCell, Pyramid, TriPeaks.
ui_layout.stock_pile: Top-left of game area when playing.
ui_layout.bottom_toolbar: Bottom of screen has New, Undo, Hint, and other buttons.
ui_layout.new_button: Bottom toolbar — click to start a new game (then confirm 'End Game').

known_issues: The app opens the LAST game played — might be Spider, not Klondike. Always click Klondike tile first.
Vision model struggles to read small card values — use single-click auto-move instead of trying to read and drag.
DO NOT declare DONE unless you made 5+ real card moves.
F2 starts a new game of the CURRENT game type — make sure Klondike is selected first.
strategy_for_agent: 1. Startup sequence handles launch, popups, and fullscreen automatically.
2. FIRST: Look at the screen. Find and click the 'Klondike' game tile in the top row.
3. If a game is in progress, click 'New' on the bottom toolbar, then 'End Game', then select 'Easy'.
4. If no game is in progress, the game starts automatically after clicking Klondike.
5. To play: SINGLE-CLICK face-up cards to auto-move them. The game figures out where they go.
6. Click the stock pile (top-left) or press D to draw new cards when no moves available.
7. Press H for hints if stuck.
8. NEVER spend more than 1 look in a row — look once, then act.
9. NEVER declare DONE until 5+ real card moves made.
10. If the screen shows a menu or dialog, press Escape to dismiss it.
